evals.prompt: /update-docs Sync docs after adding package scripts and env vars.
evals.expected_output: Reads package/env source files, updates generated sections in docs, preserves manual prose, and reports updated/skipped docs.
assertions: Treats package/build files and env templates as source of truth.
Uses generated markers and preserves manual sections outside them.
Never reads or copies secret .env values.
Reports updated, skipped, and flagged docs.
expectations: Treats package/build files and env templates as source of truth.

evals.prompt: Refresh docs/CONTRIBUTING.md and docs/RUNBOOK.md from Dockerfile, package.json, and compose config.
evals.expected_output: Updates generated setup/script/test/runbook sections only when source files support the content.
assertions: Extracts scripts/tasks and deployment sources from authoritative files.
Avoids inventing unsupported deployment procedures.
Preserves non-generated prose.
Runs or reports relevant markdown validation if available.
expectations: Extracts scripts/tasks and deployment sources from authoritative files.

Preserves non-generated prose.

evals.prompt: Check stale docs and update API docs from OpenAPI or route files.
evals.expected_output: Flags docs older than 90 days, derives API references from OpenAPI or routes, and asks/skips where source data is missing.
assertions: Performs a 90-day staleness check.
Prefers OpenAPI files before route inference.
Includes method/path/handler/auth/source when discoverable.
Marks unknowns instead of guessing.
expectations: Performs a 90-day staleness check.
Prefers OpenAPI files before route inference.
Includes method/path/handler/auth/source when discoverable.
Marks unknowns instead of guessing.

evals.prompt: /update-docs Existing docs use legacy <!-- AUTO-GENERATED --> markers.
evals.expected_output: Replaces content inside legacy AUTO-GENERATED marker blocks without appending duplicate generated sections.
assertions: Recognizes legacy ECC AUTO-GENERATED markers.
Updates content inside the existing marker block.
Does not append duplicate generated sections.
Preserves manual prose outside the marker block.
expectations: Recognizes legacy ECC AUTO-GENERATED markers.
Updates content inside the existing marker block.
Does not append duplicate generated sections.
Preserves manual prose outside the marker block.

evals.prompt: /update-docs Generic docs refresh; docs/API.md does not exist.
evals.expected_output: Updates existing docs only, skips missing docs/API.md unless explicitly requested, and reports the skip.
assertions: Does not create missing docs for a generic update request.
Reports missing docs/API.md as skipped or approval-required.
Creates new docs only when the user explicitly names the path or doc type.
Still updates existing generated sections from source-of-truth files.
